mapper.select:
SELECT o.id, o.outing_no, o.customer_id, o.out_time, o.expected_return_time, o.actual_return_time, o.remark, o.status, o.create_time, o.update_time, c.name AS customer_name FROM outing o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0
AND (o.outing_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
